title: Simple Pickaxe 7x7
description: Simple Pickaxe 7x7 is a straightforward utility mod that upgrades mining efficiency by allowing a pickaxe to break a full 7×7 area of blocks at once instead of just a single block.
body:
Simple Pickaxe 7x7 is a straightforward utility mod that upgrades mining efficiency by allowing a pickaxe to break a full 7×7 area of blocks at once instead of just a single block. Designed for players who enjoy large-scale building, excavation, and resource gathering, this mod removes repetitive mining and turns long digging sessions into fast, satisfying progress without adding complicated systems or mechanics.

The mod keeps the vanilla Minecraft feel while massively improving productivity. When the special pickaxe is used, it mines a wide square area centered on the targeted block, making it perfect for clearing tunnels, flattening terrain, quarry-style mining, and base preparation. It does not change core survival balance beyond speed and convenience, making it ideal for both casual and technical players who want smoother gameplay.

Features:

Breaks a 7×7 mining area in one action

Speeds up large excavation and building preparation

Simple design with no complex mechanics

Works naturally within survival gameplay

Great for mining projects, mega builds, and terrain shaping

Simple Pickaxe 7x7 focuses on one purpose: mine more, faster, and easier.
